name: Herb Ripper Standard Stainless Steel Grinder (3-Piece)
summary: Experience the improved design of the latest Herb Ripper Standard Stainless Steel Grinder (3-piece).
description: Experience the improved design of the latest Herb Ripper Standard Stainless Steel Grinder (3-piece). Its update allows for more efficient herb packing and supreme shredding power, minimising jamming for the perfect grind every time. This grinder offers a fine/medium hybrid grind for versatile applications. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
